title: Sharing DAM file with a contact

posts.author: cmcmurray (Clay McMurray)
posts.cookedHtml:
As I am building out my company’s DAM in Monday CRM, I am looking for a way to send a DAM file to an existing contact.

For example, I would like my sales person to locate a pitch deck in our DAM and simply click “share file” to a contact. From there, that activity should update in the contact item.

Current functionality seems to only allow you to download to your computer and then attach the file manually.
